title: शिव पञ्चरत्नम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री शिव पञ्चरत्नम् ॥

नागेन्द्रहाराय त्रिलोचनाय भस्माङ्गरागाय महेश्वराय।
नित्याय शुद्धाय दिगम्बराय तस्मै नकाराय नमः शिवाय॥ १॥

मन्दाकिनीसलिलचन्दनचर्चिताय नन्दीश्वरप्रमथनाथमहेश्वराय।
मन्दारपुष्पबहुपुष्पसुपूजिताय तस्मै मकाराय नमः शिवाय॥ २॥

शिवाय गौरीवदनाब्जवृन्दसूर्याय दक्षाध्वरनाशकाय।
श्रीनीलकण्ठाय वृषध्वजाय तस्मै शिकाराय नमः शिवाय॥ ३॥

वशिष्ठकुम्भोद्भवगौतमार्यमुनीन्द्रदेवार्चितशेखराय।
चन्द्रार्कवैश्वानरलोचनाय तस्मै वकाराय नमः शिवाय॥ ४॥

यक्षस्वरूपाय जटाधराय पिनाकहस्ताय सनातनाय।
दिव्याय देवाय दिगम्बराय तस्मै यकाराय नमः शिवाय॥ ५॥

॥ इति श्री शिव पञ्चरत्नम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
benefits: Sacred Shiva Pancharatnam for devotion and spiritual growth
Invokes blessings of Shiva in all forms
Removes sins and bestows spiritual merit
Ideal for Shiva festivals and daily worship
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Shiva, Shiva Pancharatnam (शिव पञ्चरत्नम्) stands as five gems of devotional verses. This sacred composition is sourced from Purana Tradition and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to invoke blessings of Shiva in all forms as well as remove sins and bestow spiritual merit. Additionally, it is known to grant divine protection and auspiciousness. Recitation is particularly auspicious on Monday (Somvar) and during Maha Shivaratri. With 5 verses and a reading time of about 3 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Shiva Pancharatnam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Shiva Pancharatnam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn for Shiva devotion and blessings.
